query: What is the return window for electronics?
final_answer: All products purchased from Acmera, including electronics, are eligible for return within 30 calendar days of the delivery date. If the item was purchased between November 15 and December 31, it has an extended return window until January 31 of the following year.

final_answer:
As a Gold member, you have the option to return your laptop from order ORD-445521. Typically, Acmera allows returns within a certain number of days from the delivery date. 

To proceed with the return, please visit the Acmera website or app, go to your order history, and select the option to initiate a return for order ORD-445521. Follow the instructions provided to complete the return process. If you encounter any issues or need further assistance, feel free to reach out to our customer support team.
